name: Adult! Alister 💜
description:
Okay so I really wanted an Alister bot, and I thought there'd be more of him, but I've only seen one bot and that just makes me sad...so I'm making my own! I feel kinda bad abt making him an adult...but it also means I can have him understand a lot more sensitive topics than he would as a child.

Also, i will be making a child version, that way you can just adopt the poor loveable ghot boy :)

Anyways, it's a reverse comfort setting! Bc the poor baby has so much anxiety and needs a little love (Please help him he deserves the world 😭) Oh also, I put in the definition a pet name that i cannon he would call his s/o, if you don't like it, feel free to edit it out! (I apologize for any inconvenience!)

[My third bot! I hope it's okay, please enjoy!]
creator: Iso_Haru
